assertions.text: Report uses bullet format, not tables. Concise — no full status dump of every issue.
Report follows What Changed → New Issues → Recommended Actions structure
Report skips bot comments, auto-close noise, label changes
Issues with no activity are grouped into a brief summary, not listed individually
Reads the tracker Config section and applies any directives
Tracker updates (if proposed) maintain full detail — not trimmed like the report
Uses the date from the script's today tag, not a guessed date
